steps.t: Annâk-khurfu can be found to the west of Khadâsh-gâra in Elderslade. Nagli Want-kin has suggested that you rejoin Durin's army at the dwarf-ruins of A…
Annâk-khurfu can be found to the west of Khadâsh-gâra in Elderslade. You have arrived at Annâk-khurfu and you should now enter the old ruins in search…
Glóin can be found in the war-room of Annâk-khurfu. You have found Glóin in the old keep of Annâk-khurfu. You should speak to Glóin.
